name: Council Announcement EN/FR
description: Municipal or institutional bilingual council announcement with formal structure.

cues.label: Pre-Roll / Holding Slate
cues.notes: Hold before official start. Display institution logo slate.

cues.label: Chair Introduction
cues.notes: Council chair or clerk calls meeting to order.

cues.label: Supporting Remarks
cues.notes: Additional councillors or officials may add remarks.

cues.label: Media Questions
cues.notes: Questions from accredited media. Clear lower third.

cues.label: Closing Statement
cues.notes: Chair formally closes the announcement session.
